Custom Agriculture Yard Signs for Farm Business & Market Promotion

Custom agriculture yard signs are the perfect promotional tool for farms, agricultural businesses, and farmers market vendors. These lightweight, weatherproof corrugated plastic signs are designed to withstand outdoor conditions while delivering your farming message to passing traffic and potential customers.

Agriculture yard signs excel at promoting farm stands, seasonal produce sales, agricultural events, and farm business services. Their durability and full-color printing capabilities make them ideal for displaying product information, pricing, and business branding in agricultural settings.

All agriculture yard signs are printed on 4mm white corrugated plastic material with hollow flutes running horizontally. This material provides excellent durability while remaining lightweight and waterproof for extended outdoor display on farms and agricultural properties.

Agriculture Yard Sign Features

  • 4mm corrugated plastic construction for weather resistance
  • Full CMYK color printing for vibrant farm branding
  • Single or double-sided printing options
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and repositioning
  • Available with H-stakes for ground installation
  • Custom sizing options for various agricultural applications

Sizing Note: All corrugated agriculture yard signs are cut 1/8th inch smaller on each side for finishing (example: 18" x 24" signs ship as 17.75" x 23.75").

Large Sign Scoring: Signs over 32" x 48" or where height + width exceeds 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Contact customer service if flat shipping is required.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Farm Display

Agriculture yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast), specifically chosen for agricultural environments and outdoor farm displays.

Corrugated Plastic Material Benefits

  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof construction withstands rain, snow, and agricultural irrigation
  • Durability: Hollow fluted design provides strength while maintaining lightweight portability
  • Print Quality: Smooth white surface accepts full-color digital printing for crisp farm branding
  • Chemical Resistance: Suitable for agricultural environments with fertilizers and pesticides
  • UV Stability: Maintains color integrity during extended sun exposure in farm fields

Material Construction

The 4mm corrugated plastic features hollow flutes running horizontally on standard 4' x 8' sheets. This fluted design creates a lightweight yet rigid structure perfect for agricultural yard sign applications.

Finishing Options Available

  • 1/2" white margin border or full bleed printing
  • Single-sided or double-sided printing
  • Compatible with H-stakes, beefy stakes, and zip tie mounting

The corrugated plastic material is specifically selected for agricultural use, providing the durability needed for farm environments while remaining cost-effective for seasonal promotions and events.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Yard Sign Finishing Options for Professional Farm Display

Professional finishing options ensure your agriculture yard signs present a polished appearance for farm business promotion and agricultural marketing.

Print Finishing Options

  • Full Bleed Printing: Ink extends completely to sign edges for maximum visual impact
  • White Margin: 1/2" white border provides clean, professional framing
  • Single-Sided: Cost-effective option for directional agricultural signage
  • Double-Sided: Maximum visibility from multiple directions on farm properties

Installation Hardware Options

  • H-Stakes: Available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" agriculture yard signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty ground installation for larger farm signs
  • 12" Black Zip Ties: Secure mounting to fencing and agricultural structures
  • 36" White Zip Ties: Extended reach for larger mounting applications

Large Sign Handling

Agriculture yard signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81 inches receive automatic scoring and folding for efficient shipping. The scoring process cuts through the top layer without penetrating completely, allowing controlled folding while maintaining sign integrity.

Farm businesses requiring flat shipping for oversized agriculture yard signs can contact customer service for specialized shipping arrangements.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Agriculture Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Flexible production schedules accommodate urgent farm promotions and seasonal agricultural marketing timelines with options ranging from one to five business days.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Express turnaround for time-critical agricultural events and immediate farm promotional needs.

  • Ideal for last-minute farmers market preparation
  • Perfect for urgent farm event promotion
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases

2 Business Days Express Production

Fast production for upcoming agricultural events while maintaining quality standards.

  • Suitable for weekend farmers market preparation
  • Accommodates short-notice farm promotional campaigns
  • Balances speed with cost-effectiveness

3 Business Days Standard Production

Most popular production timeline offering excellent value for routine agricultural signage needs.

  • Free production option for budget-conscious farms
  • Ideal for seasonal agricultural promotions
  • Sufficient time for quality control and finishing

5 Business Days Saver Production

Economy option for advance agricultural planning and cost-conscious farm businesses.

  • Maximum cost savings for large agriculture yard sign orders
  • Perfect for planned seasonal campaigns
  • Ideal for non-urgent farm promotional materials

Production Timeline Notes

  • Production begins upon file approval completion
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day
  • Turnaround calculation includes production time only (shipping time additional)
  • Proof requests pause production until approval is received
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Yard Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Convenient payment methods accommodate farm business budgeting and agricultural seasonal cash flow requirements.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Payment by check with advance processing requirement
  • Farm Business Accounts: Suitable for agricultural business expense management

Payment Processing

All agriculture yard signs require full payment before production begins. Credit cards are charged only after order approval, ensuring accuracy before processing.

Check Payment Information

Farm businesses paying by check must submit payment before production initiation. Check payments accommodate agricultural businesses managing seasonal cash flow and expense timing.

Order Approval Process

  • No charges applied until order approval is confirmed
  • Proof review available before payment processing
  • Order modifications possible before final approval
  • Transparent pricing with no hidden fees for farm customers

Agricultural Business Support

Customer service representatives understand agricultural seasonal needs and can assist with order timing to align with farming schedules and promotional requirements.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Agriculture Yard Sign Delivery

Reliable shipping ensures agriculture yard signs arrive when needed for farm promotions, seasonal sales, and agricultural events.

Standard Shipping Methods

  • UPS Ground: 1-3 day delivery to 90% of United States
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days
  • Three Day: 3 business days
  • Two Day: 2 business days
  • Overnight: Next business day delivery
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery guarantee

Economy Shipping

Cost-effective delivery option for non-urgent agriculture yard sign orders, with additional 5-10 days depending on destination. Include complete address information including P.O. Box details for rural farm delivery.

Shipping Cost Factors

  • Package weight and dimensions
  • Delivery destination and distance
  • Selected shipping speed
  • Additional charges apply to oversized agriculture yard sign orders

Order Tracking

Tracking numbers provided once agriculture yard signs ship, allowing farms to monitor delivery progress for event planning and promotional timeline coordination.

Shipping Protection

  • Lost packages replaced after shipping company confirms loss (7-10 business days)
  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing
  • Natural disaster delays do not qualify for shipping refunds
  • Shipping company terms apply after package pickup

International Agricultural Customers

International shipping available via USPS and UPS with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation.

Production Facility Locations

Agriculture yard signs produced in Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, selected based on optimal delivery efficiency to customer location.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agricultural Applications & Farm Uses for Custom Yard Signs

Agriculture yard signs serve diverse promotional and informational needs across farming operations, agricultural businesses, and rural marketing applications.

Farmers Market Applications

  • Product pricing and availability displays
  • Organic certification and farming method promotion
  • Seasonal produce and harvest announcements
  • Farm stand location and hours information
  • Payment method and contact information display

Farm Business Promotion

  • Agritourism attraction and event advertising
  • U-pick operation promotion and directions
  • Farm equipment sales and service advertising
  • Agricultural consulting and custom farming services
  • Livestock breeding and sales promotion

Seasonal Agricultural Events

  • Harvest festival and farm tour promotion
  • Pumpkin patch and corn maze advertising
  • Christmas tree farm seasonal promotion
  • Farm wedding venue and event space marketing
  • Agricultural education and workshop announcements

Property and Land Use

  • Farm property for sale or lease advertising
  • Agricultural land use designation
  • Hunting lease and recreational access information
  • Property boundary and ownership identification
  • No trespassing and agricultural operation notices

Community Agricultural Support

  • 4-H and FFA chapter promotion
  • Agricultural fair and competition announcements
  • Farm-to-table restaurant partnership advertising
  • Agricultural advocacy and educational campaigns
  • Rural community event and fundraising promotion
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and professional appearance for agriculture yard sign production.

Preferred File Formats

  • .EPS files converted to outline: Highest quality vector format for crisp text and logos
  • High-resolution PDF: Excellent for mixed text and image agriculture designs
  • High-resolution TIFF: Superior for photographic agricultural content
  • High-resolution JPG: Acceptable for image-heavy farm promotional designs

Resolution Requirements

Agriculture yard sign artwork should be created at 300 DPI or higher resolution for professional print quality. Lower resolution files may result in pixelated or blurry farm signage.

File Size Considerations

Upload files up to 60 MB directly through the online system. Agriculture yard signs with larger artwork files require special handling - contact customer service for upload instructions.

Design Quality Assessment

Professional graphic designers review all agriculture yard sign artwork for print suitability and will contact customers regarding any quality concerns before production begins.

Order Proof System

Optional order proofs provide low-resolution preview images and complete order summaries including pricing, billing, and shipping information. Proof approval is required before agriculture yard sign production begins when requested.

Color Match Proof System

Color-critical agriculture yard sign projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, ensuring accurate color reproduction for farm branding and agricultural business identity materials.

Agricultural Design Considerations

  • High contrast text for outdoor visibility in farm environments
  • Bold fonts readable from vehicle traffic distances
  • Weather-resistant color selections for extended agricultural use
  • Clear hierarchy for pricing, contact, and promotional information
PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Agriculture Yard Signs for Farm Business Promotion

Ready to promote your agricultural business with professional yard signage? Our custom agriculture yard signs deliver the durability and visual impact needed for successful farm marketing and rural business promotion.

Why Agriculture Businesses Choose Our Yard Signs

  • Weather-Resistant Construction: 4mm corrugated plastic withstands harsh agricultural environments
  • Full-Color Printing: Vibrant CMYK printing showcases farm products and branding professionally
  • Fast Production: 1-5 business day turnaround accommodates urgent agricultural promotional needs
  • Installation Hardware: H-stakes and mounting accessories included for immediate farm display
  • Custom Sizing: Multiple size options accommodate various agricultural applications

Start Your Agriculture Yard Sign Order

Design your custom agriculture yard signs using three convenient methods:

  1. Select Agricultural Templates: Choose from pre-designed farm and agriculture templates for quick customization
  2. Upload Print-Ready Files: Submit your completed agriculture yard sign artwork for professional printing
  3. Professional Design Service: Work with our graphic designers to create custom agricultural signage

Our customer service team understands agricultural seasonal requirements and can assist with order timing to support your farm's promotional schedule. Contact us at (320) 391-5300 for personalized agriculture yard sign consultation.

Agricultural Business Support

From farmers market vendors to large agricultural operations, our yard signs support diverse farming promotional needs. Single or double-sided printing accommodates various agricultural marketing strategies and budget requirements.

Ready to grow your agricultural business visibility? Start designing your custom agriculture yard signs today and join thousands of successful farms using professional signage for business growth.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Yard Sign Frequently Asked Questions

What material are agriculture yard signs made from?

Agriculture yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) with hollow flutes for lightweight durability. This weatherproof material is specifically chosen for agricultural environments and outdoor farm displays.

How long do agriculture yard signs last outdoors?

When properly installed, agriculture yard signs withstand multiple seasons of outdoor exposure. The corrugated plastic material resists rain, snow, UV rays, and agricultural chemicals commonly found in farming environments.

What sizes are available for agriculture yard signs?

Standard sizes range from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96". Custom sizing is available for specific agricultural applications. Signs over 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency.

Can I get double-sided agriculture yard signs?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for maximum visibility from multiple directions on farm properties. This option is popular for roadside farm stands and agricultural event promotion.

What installation hardware is available?

H-stakes are available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" signs. Beefy stakes accommodate larger agriculture yard signs. Zip ties in 12" and 36" lengths enable mounting to fencing and agricultural structures.

How should I prepare artwork for agriculture yard sign printing?

Submit high-resolution files (300 DPI or higher) in .EPS, .PDF, .TIFF, or .JPG format. Include high-contrast text for outdoor visibility and bold fonts readable from traffic distances.

What is the production time for agriculture yard signs?

Production times range from 1-5 business days depending on selected timeline. Express options accommodate urgent agricultural promotional needs, while economy production offers cost savings for advance planning.

Do you offer design services for agriculture yard signs?

Yes, professional graphic designers can create custom agriculture yard signs tailored to your farm business needs. Templates are also available for common agricultural applications.

How are large agriculture yard signs shipped?

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" are scored and folded for efficient shipping. Flat shipping is available for an additional cost when required for specific agricultural installations.

Can agriculture yard signs be used in organic farming operations?

Yes, our corrugated plastic material and printing inks are suitable for organic farming environments. The signs can promote organic certification and sustainable farming practices effectively.
